gateway.root_error:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>OpenClaw Control</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="dark light" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./favicon.svg" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="./favicon-32.png" />
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="./apple-touch-icon.png" />
    <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.webmanifest" />
    <script>
      (function () {
        var THEMES = { claw: 1, knot: 1, dash: 1 };
        var MODES = { system: 1, light: 1, dark: 1 };
        var LEGACY = {
          dark: "claw:dark",
          light: "claw:light",
          openknot: "knot:dark",
          fieldmanual: "dash:dark",
          clawdash: "dash:light",
          system: "claw:system",
        };
        try {
          var keys = Object.keys(localStorage);
          var raw;
          for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
            if (keys[i].indexOf("openclaw.control.settings.v1") === 0) {
              raw = localStorage.getItem(keys[i]);
              if (raw) break;
            }
          }
          if (!raw) return;
          var s = JSON.parse(raw);
          var t = s && s.theme;
          var m = s && s.themeMode;
          if (typeof t !== "string") t = "";
          if (typeof m !== "string") m = "";
          var legacy = LEGACY[t];
          var theme = THEMES[t] ? t : legacy ? legacy.split(":")[0] : "claw";
          var mode = MODES[m] ? m : legacy ? legacy.split(":")[1] : "system";
          if (mode === "system") {
            mode = window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: light)").matches ? "light" : "dark";
          }
          var resolved =
            theme === "knot"
              ? mode === "light"
                ? "openknot-light"
                : "openknot"
              : theme === "dash"
                ? mode === "light"
                  ? "dash-light"
                  : "dash"
                : mode === "light"
                  ? "light"
                  : "dark";
          document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", resolved);
          document.documentElement.setAttribute(
            "data-theme-mode",
            resolved.indexOf("light") !== -1 ? "light" : "dark",
          );
        } catch (e) {}
      })();
    </script>
    <script type="module" crossorigin src="./assets/index-0RNoHvMd.js"></script>
    <link rel="modulepreload" crossorigin href="./assets/string-coerce-BaiOg1Ie.js">
    <link rel="modulepreload" crossorigin href="./assets/directive-CXGeywn2.js">
    <link rel="stylesheet" crossorigin href="./assets/index-DVY8hbWN.css">
  </head>
  <body>
    <openclaw-app></openclaw-app>
  </body>
</html>

invariants.rule: GoldMemory must reference approved review_id or explicit reviewed state.
RAW, BRONZE, social_raw, raw_song_seed, raw_idea must have qmd_index_allowed=false.
Candidate items cannot be written to Vault before review/gold.
Profile/council/psychometric/support claims must not surface as truth before review.
Only one OpenClaw runtime may own Telegram.
Heartbeat commands that generate no candidate must include no_output_reason.
Every evidence_ref must resolve to an existing state file item or file path.
Context pack may include counts/summaries but not raw private candidate content.

human_entry.who_are_these_people: A research community around design, infrastructure, method, and human action.
human_entry.what_problem_are_they_living_inside: How systems shape what people can notice, choose, remember, and become.
human_entry.what_is_obvious_to_them_but_not_to_me: Interfaces are governance surfaces, not only presentation layers.
human_entry.how_this_connects_to_my_work: Use the seed as onboarding before critique, then connect it to Crack Research and Reversing Simon later.

tasks.task: Add three tests for one module per commit.

functional_frame.summary: The pattern is framed as functional support need, not diagnosis.

neurodivergent_support.environment_or_prompt_change: show last checkpoint before new task
neurodivergent_support.risk_of_overaccommodation: too much scaffolding may delay action

mentor.probe: What exactly gets lost when re-entering this thread?
mentor.training_task: Write one resume anchor before stopping work.

contrarian.weakness_point: Architecture can become avoidance if it does not close into daily action.
contrarian.counterargument: More bridge work may avoid actual use.
contrarian.test: Can Otto choose one action tomorrow morning?

morpheus_meaning.meaning: The system is a continuity prosthesis.
morpheus_meaning.image_or_metaphor: a lantern at the mouth of every tunnel

execution_partner.expected_outcome: daily_handoff.json and action_queue.jsonl generated with no side effects

synthesis.weakness_point: Architecture can become avoidance if it does not close into daily action.
synthesis.stop_rule: no social/profile automation before daily-loop dry-run
synthesis.mentor_probe_or_task: write one resume anchor before ending each session
